title: IC2C UU-Matter
description: Addon for IC2-Classic adding JEI pages for UU-Matter and Plasma creation
body:
This mod is an addon for [IC2-Classic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ic2-classic) adding [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) pages for UU-Matter and Plasma creation.


By default IC2 Classic does not add a GUI for how to create UU Matter and the same goes for Plasma Cells.
This mod fixes that by adding 2 new JEI categories, that shows how UU-Matter and Plasma Cells are made.

Client-side: Required

Server-side: Optional

With this mod you can press "Show Recipe" (which is normally bound to R key via JEI) on UU-Matter and Plasma Cells to see how they are made.


The Mass Fabricator category shows:
What IC2 machine tier the Mass Fabricator has.
Optional amplifiers, how much EU/packet the machine can handle, and how much energy is required.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FOVCOVzb/images/efbc6dfd13ae3c5ba0fb1b67d045a73a70fd66c9.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FOVCOVzb/images/eaeb1876d5b87aee8945855c5322e4876a9a4810.png)

The Plasmafier category shows:
What IC2 machine tier the Plasmafier has.
How much EU/packet the machine can handle, and the processing time in game ticks.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FOVCOVzb/images/f73f710f8a7cbebfee75d2f24c2a602a3b8188b1.png)
